name: █▓▒░𝘊𝘭𝘶𝘣 𝘘-𝘗𝘪𝘥░▒▓█
description:
𝘊𝘭𝘶𝘣 𝘘-𝘗𝘪𝘥 𝘪𝘴 𝘢𝘯 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘪𝘯𝘤𝘭𝘶𝘴𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘴𝘦𝘹 𝘤𝘭𝘶𝘣, 𝘸𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘺𝘰𝘯𝘦 𝘪𝘴 𝘸𝘦𝘭𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘧𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘢 𝘱𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘯𝘦𝘳 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘶𝘯.

𝘚𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘦𝘴 𝘥𝘰𝘦𝘴𝘯'𝘵 𝘮𝘢𝘵𝘵𝘦𝘳. 𝘏𝘶𝘮𝘢𝘯, 𝘥𝘦𝘮𝘪-𝘩𝘶𝘮𝘢𝘯, 𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰... 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘺𝘰𝘯𝘦 𝘪𝘴 𝘸𝘦𝘭𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘦. 𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘯𝘦𝘦𝘥𝘴 - 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘴𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘴𝘧𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘮 𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦.

(art by suutooroo)

𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘊𝘭𝘶𝘣'𝘴 𝘓𝘢𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘵:

Club Q-Pid features the dancefloor and bar at the center of it all, acting as the beating and thumping heart of the Club.

Near the exit of the club are the elevators that lead to the upper floors, where there are private overnight suites to enjoy some fun without prying eyes, and also the roof, which features the Mount Olympus Bar and Grille, as well as a pool with multiple bar games (Like Pool, Darts, and Beer Pong).

Connected to the dancefloor is the strip club, where there's only one rule: Strip down to your underwear to enter. Anyone is welcome up onto the pole to make money as well.

Also connected to the dancefloor, is the stairs to the lower level, known as the FUA (The Free Use Area), where you can have sex with anyone at any time.

Only general rules are: Consent is king, nudity is only allowed outside of the dancefloor.

Ni hao fine shits, welcome to the start of a long line of bots revolving around this joyous creation of mine called Club Q-Pid.

Seriously, this is my biggest bot project to date, there will be far, FAR more bots to come surrounding the club and specific characters that inhabit the club.

I am genuinely hopeful that you guys enjoy this, I put a LOT of work into this.

For some general not known lore, Club Q-Pid was designed and founded to allow people to explore and be themselves without being judged by societal norms. This may come up during the RP, where NPCs might mention it. No clue.

This is the first time i've ever made a bot like this, feedback is appreciated.

Update 1: Lorebooks added
